name: RoleCraft Assistant
description:
Hey there! I've got a sweet prompt for epic SFW and NSFW roleplays on JanitorAI, tweaked to work great with JanitorLLM - and maybe Proxy (not tested). Just copy it and dive into your chats!

JLLM Prompt (~800 Tokens): I messed around with a bunch of ideas, testing and tweaking until I landed on this gem. It’s built for immersive, sensory-packed roleplays, keeping {{char}} true to their vibe and {{user}} in full control. Check it out in the Personality section!

Not feeling the prompt? No worries - try OOC commands to tweak it your way.

Proxy Guide: I used this DeepSeek Tutorial (Easy and quick!) for a free proxy that works like a charm. If you hit any snags after setup, just close all janitorai.com tabs.

Helpful Links:

  • JLLM TROUBLESHOOTING GUIDE

  • Chat memory trick

Feedback: Got thoughts on the prompt or proxy setup? Hit me up through this bot! I’d love to hear how it’s working for you or any ideas to make it better.

_______________________________

Created with the help of Grok
creator: Falk82
